title: The Gnome
description: The Gnome Chronicles mod, based on a TikTok meme
body:
[https://bisecthosting.com/icedfox](https://bisecthosting.com/icedfox)
## **[EN-US]**

*The Gnome Chronicles* mod, you can summon a whimsical Mage inspired by a TikTok meme using a magical flute. This small green gnome, dressed in an emerald robe and a pointed hat, will become your servant once you enslave him with **Magic Dust**, which you can craft at your workbench. As his loyal servant, he will follow your commands and trade with you, potentially offering a powerful magic wand with temporary abilities.

### **New Update: Magic Dust Reinforced**

- **Magic Dust Reinforced** is created by combining regular Magic Dust with Netherite.
- By giving 5 Magic Dust Reinforced items to the gnome, you will receive a **Summon Staff** that summons magical disciples for combat.
- These disciples have:
  - **12 Health**
  - **1 Damage**
  - **2 Attack Speed**
  - **0.25 Movement Speed**


- By giving 2 additional Magic Dust Reinforced items to a disciple, you’ll receive a **Magical Broom** to cast spells like:
  - **Magical Immobilization**
  - **Magical Expansive Wave** (deals 4 damage)

- Disciples also have passive abilities such as:
  - **Protective Shield**
  - **Haste II**
  - Their own offensive spells

To maintain this magical exchange, you'll need more Magic Dust, which grants extra hearts to boost your vitality. Keep trading and exploring the secrets of the green gnome.

### **Mage Gnome**

> **Mage**  
> **HP:** 35  
> **Damage:** 9  

![Mage Normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f32d9b362b4232f18727a3505a342aa57562fb4.png)
![Mage Sitting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b83fb512deae6f83b673528fe349d0cf4e4ed229.png)

### **Mage Gnome Disciple**

> **Mage**  
> **HP:** 12  
> **Damage:** 1  
> **Magic Abilities:** 4  

![Disciple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/528d97c52edc89c7511068b85fb64f4c800033a9.png)

  - **Damage:** 4

- **Summon Staff**

  ![Summon Staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/954c574c142080706ca0c393a617da1d3d7ed74b.png)
